reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 9.6% and 20-day momentum is 28.0%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 12.6% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.4%, downside volatility near 0.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is 41.0% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 9.2% versus SPY over 5 days and 9.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.67, confidence 0.40, and 0.3 weighted articles across 4 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.81, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 5 articles across 4 sources, 0.3 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.73, average source quality 0.91, confidence 0.72.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.03).
Overall model score is 0.211 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Alphabet Inc. filed 10-Q: 10-Q
news_evidence.llm_reason: Official Alphabet 10-Q for quarter ended 2026-03-31. As a regulatory quarterly report, it can contain financial details, risk disclosures, or other items that influence near-term trading; likely the most material item in this set.

news_evidence.title: Alphabet Inc. filed 8-K: 8-K
news_evidence.llm_reason: Alphabet 8-K filing. 8-Ks can report a range of potentially material events (earnings release notice, executive changes, agreements). Without the filing text, it's treated as potentially market-moving but uncertain.
